name: rethunk-plugins
description: Rethunk's catalog of Claude Code plugins — prompts, agents, and MCP servers.

plugins.name: rethunk-git
plugins.description: Multi-root git MCP server: status, inventory, HEAD parity, diffs, batch commit, push, merge, worktrees.

plugins.name: rethunk-github
plugins.description: GitHub rollup MCP server: multi-repo dashboards, PR preflight, CI diagnosis, releases, and write tools.

plugins.name: citadel-sdd
plugins.description: Citadel Spec-Driven Development MCP server: spec lifecycle, task tracking, lint, and status for agent workflows.
